title: Pattern first
text: For two rails, the encoded text is simply the top rail followed by the bottom rail. Think about how many letters should appear on each rail to reconstruct the zig-zag.

title: Procedure
text: Split the encoded message into two parts — one for each rail. Then rebuild the zig-zag by alternating between the top and bottom rails (1 → 2 → 1 → 2 …), using letters from your two parts in order to recover the original message.
